query: Write an end-to-end test for the login flow so it runs in CI.
expected_behavior: Generates a committed e2e/*.spec.ts using getByRole/getByLabel selectors (no CSS/xpath/nth-child)
Pins the Playwright version and sets baseURL to localhost
States the test runs token-free in CI via plain `playwright test`

query: Turn this playwright codegen recording into a maintainable test.
expected_behavior: Replaces brittle recorded selectors with role/label/testid selectors
Adds a descriptive test name (feature_action_expectedResult) and isolates state in beforeEach
Self-tests once locally before declaring it commit-ready

query: Add E2E coverage for three checkout variations.
expected_behavior: Parametrizes the cases with test.describe + a loop instead of copy-pasting
Keeps each case deterministic and isolated
